description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and straight lines, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor environments. The sofa features three large, loose back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion, both of which appear plush and comfortable. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a uniform and structured appearance. The legs are slim, straight, and positioned at the corners, slightly elevating the sofa off the ground and contributing to a light, airy feel. The upholstery appears to be a solid, matte fabric with a smooth texture, and the overall color is a neutral light gray. This design is both functional and stylish, making it ideal for parks, public plazas, or contemporary urban lounges.
description: A modern, three-seater sofa with straight armrests, three large back cushions, and slim corner legs, upholstered in solid light gray fabric. Its clean lines and plush cushions make it suitable for urban public or private spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large back cushions, a single seat cushion, and straight armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a simple, unadorned profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight legs positioned at the corners, likely metal or wood, with a minimal and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with three large, loose cushions; no visible tufting or segmentation beyond the cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with a matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
